question: What are the top stop locations for the North Region fleet in the last 30 days?
reasoning: Oakland Distribution Center anchors the North Region at 247 visits — the undisputed hub for inter-depot transfers. Berkeley Service Center (189 visits, 29 min avg dwell) is the primary maintenance and top-off stop. Richmond Depot carries the longest average dwell at 45 min, consistent with loading dock queuing. San Leandro Warehouse's 54 min avg dwell flags it as a consolidation bottleneck; scheduling a second unloading bay slot could cut wait time by ~30%. Castro Valley sees lower volume (44 visits) but serves as the southernmost anchor for n6 and n8 routes.
